name: Datapane
description: Python reporting/dashboard library with hosted publishing.

seo.title: Datapane — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Datapane: Python reporting/dashboard library with hosted publishing.

when_to_use: Publishing Python data visualizations as shareable reports
Automating scheduled analytics reports from pandas/plotly
Embedding interactive charts in documentation or wikis
Replacing static PDF reports with interactive HTML reports

pros: Turn Python notebooks into shareable reports
No web stack needed for dashboards
cons: Interactivity limited vs Streamlit or Dash
Project reduced focus in recent years
review.verdict: Quick wins for static Python reports; Streamlit now owns the broader dashboard niche.
review.best_for: Data scientists sharing static or lightly-interactive Python reports
review.not_for: Teams needing rich interactivity — Streamlit or Dash fit better

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
